#REDIRECT [[Ninefold Vaccine]]Firmlaw is a set of rules designed to help one implement the [[Sevenfold Vaccine]] and achieve and maintain [[Nobility]]. 

firmlaw also has health elements as physical health is considered linked to nobility and ascension. These may include

* Always eat a low calorie diet to increase longevity
* Do not stay up past midnight unless a job requires it

Firmlaw is derived from dharma, the English term firm is cognate with dharma, and law is added as a descriptor and to maintain syllable count

[[Category:Firmlaw]]
[[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Firmlaw]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
